topic: Meet Pip, Mo, and Bo - the day they hatched
brief: This is a pilot episode introducing the three chickens for the very first time. We see three eggs in a cozy nest inside the Cozy Coop, sunlight streaming through the window. CRACK! The first egg breaks - out tumbles Pip, red-orange and already curious, asking what everything is and trying to hop before her legs work. CRACK! The second egg opens slowly - Mo emerges quietly, blinking through his round green glasses, observing his sisters. CRACK CRACK! The third egg cracks twice - Bo bursts out, strikes a silly pose, and immediately makes a joke about how dramatic her entrance was. The three chickens meet each other for the first time. They look around the coop. They realise they are sisters and friends. The story ends with all three peeking out of the coop's blue door at the world outside, ready for tomorrow's adventure. Pip says the line that will become the channel's signature: 'Are you ready for an adventure?'
lesson: Three friends can be very different from each other - curious, calm, silly - and that mix is what makes them stronger together.
mood: warm, welcoming, gently magical - like a picture book reading at bedtime
angle: Pip is the audience surrogate (curious, hopping, asking). Mo is the gentle observer (one or two soft remarks, late). Bo is the energy and the laughter throughout. Each character gets a clear introduction moment that establishes who they are.
